title: Snow Golem Lives On!
description: Allows Snow Golems to conditionally survive in hot Biomes.
body:
Snow Golem can live in hot Biomes under the conditions that they stand on ice blocks, any ice!  

Made this mod to make cool Nether Mob farm!

Here is a Snow Golem Chilling in the Nether.  
![chilling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7efb3d519b9dd5837f94b3da05d1c6c782ed5a83.png)

Here is the same Golem but from the back.  
![chilling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7210a25d1a5d6c5e58435a48409568e93f90457.png)

Still the same Golem but further away.  
![far](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22f97efea1f4f2e793d9bc0140a4b37905fe7938.png)

It's very far now.  
![far golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8345008cd97b95008e5937f60b7f68e2cc2f3b39.png)
